speaker: alice
text: Let's kick off with Earth Day 2026, and this year's theme is absolutely brilliant - 'Our Power, Our Planet'. It's all about everyday communities taking the lead on environmental action.

speaker: charlie
text: Yeah, it's not just sitting around waiting for politicians to sort things out. Communities worldwide are rolling up their sleeves and making real change happen right in their own backyards.

speaker: alice
text: And speaking of awesome community wins - French locals have pushed through a complete ban on forever chemicals in cosmetics and clothing. These nasty chemicals linger in the environment for decades, but France said 'not on our watch' and banned them outright this year.
